content.full_text:
May 27, 2004

Ernest Tracy
Post Office Box 787
Dorris, CA 96023-0787

Re: Your Request for Advice
Our File No. W-04-057

Dear Mr. Tracy:

This letter is to notify you that, pursuant to our telephone conversation of May 26, 2004, we have withdrawn your request for advice.

If you have any other questions regarding this matter, please contact me at (916) 322-5660.

Sincerely,

Luisa Menchaca
General Counsel

Kelly L. Winsor

By: Kelly L. Winsor
Legal Analyst
